chunks.title: Elijah and Obadiah Meet
chunks.reason: Narrative of Elijah's return and his encounter with Obadiah.

chunks.title: Confrontation at Carmel
chunks.reason: Dialogue between Ahab and Elijah setting up the contest.

chunks.title: Baal Prophets Fail
chunks.reason: Narrative of the Baal prophets calling on their god without success.

chunks.title: Elijah Prepares the Altar
chunks.reason: Narrative of Elijah rebuilding the altar and drenching it with water.

chunks.title: Fire Falls and Judgment
chunks.reason: Elijah's prayer, the fire consuming the offering, and the slaughter of Baal's prophets.

chunks.title: Rain Comes and Elijah Flees
chunks.reason: Narrative of the rain falling and Elijah running ahead of Ahab.
